$description: Control sizing steps measured from the ACTUAL radix-nova cva variants in components/ui/button.tsx + input.tsx (default/md = h-8). Basis for Phase 4 component tokens and density modes.

sm.$description: h-7 — button size sm, input size sm.

md.$description: h-8 — button/input DEFAULT, select trigger, tabs list.

xl.$description: h-10 — button/input size xl, table header row.
